# MuleSoft Hybrid Standalone

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (master) of Hybrid Standalone documentation.
> See [Hybrid Standalone llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hybrid-standalone/llms-full.txt) for all the Hybrid Standalone documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Adding Ports, IPs, and Hostnames for Runtime Manager Agent](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hybrid-standalone/configure-ports-ips.md)
- [Creating Alerts for Mule Apps Deployed to Hybrid Standalone](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hybrid-standalone/creating-alerts-hybrid-apps.md)
- [Creating Alerts for Servers, Server Groups, and Clusters](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hybrid-standalone/creating-alerts-hybrid.md)

- [Creating Server Groups](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hybrid-standalone/creating-servers-groups.md)
- [Creating Servers](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hybrid-standalone/creating-servers.md)

- [Requirements and Limitations for Hybrid Standalone Instances](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hybrid-standalone/hybrid-standalone-requirements-limitations.md)
- [Hybrid Standalone](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hybrid-standalone/index.md)
- [Managing Mule Apps Deployed to Hybrid Standalone Instances](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hybrid-standalone/managing-apps-hybrid-standalone.md)

- [Managing Hybrid Standalone Instances](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hybrid-standalone/managing-hybrid-standalone.md)

- [Managing Schedulers](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hybrid-standalone/managing-schedulers-hybrid.md)
- [Managing Server Groups](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hybrid-standalone/managing-servers-groups.md)
